title: The Ramana Library
meta_description: A curated collection of free e-books on Ramana Maharshi and Advaita Vedanta, gathered from public-domain and freely shared sources across the internet.
body_html:
Ramana Library

Disclaimer: All e-books offered here have been gathered from sources that already make them freely accessible across the internet. Our role has simply been to collate these public-domain or freely shared files into an easy-to-download format so that readers can discover and enjoy them more conveniently. We neither charge for access nor derive any revenue from their distribution. Full copyright and all related rights remain with the original authors, publishers, or other rightful owners; we assert no ownership or control over the material. If you hold rights to a work hosted here and would prefer it to be removed or credited differently, please let us know and we will address your request promptly.

  • Sri Ramana Thiruvarul Nidhi — V. Ganesan
  • Sri Ramana’s Upadesa Saram — Rajiv Kapur
  • Talks With Ramana Maharshi - Volume 1 — Sri Munagala S. Venkataramiah
  • Guru Ramana Memories and Notes — S. S. Cohen
  • The Ribhu Gita — Dr. Lingeswara Rao and Dr. Anil Sharma
  • The Maharshi and His Message — Paul Brunton
  • Gems of Bhagavan — A. Devaraja Mudaliar
  • Day by Day with Bhagavan — A. Devaraja Mudaliar
  • The Collected Works of Sri Ramana Maharshi
  • Maha Yoga or The Upanishadic Lore
  • Ramana Maharshi and The Path of Self-Knowledge — Arthur Osborne
  • Who Am I? - The Teachings of Bhagavan Sri Ramana Maharshi
  • Revelation - Sri Ramana Hridayam — T. N. Venkataraman
  • Self-Enquiry (Vicharasangraham) — Bhagavan Sri Ramana Maharshi
  • Sat-Darshana Bhasy and Talks with Maharshi
  • The Supreme Science as of the Self as Taught — Sri Ramana Maharshi
  • Spiritual Instruction — Bhagavan Sri Ramana Maharshi
  • Arunachala Siva — Bhagavan Sri Ramana Maharshi
  • 40 Verses on Reality - “Ulladu Narpadu” — Ramana Maharishi
  • Sri Lalita Sahasranama Stotram — Swami Shantananda Puri
  • Selected Gems from Ashtavakra Gita — Swami Shantananda Puri
  • Sadhanas from Upadesha Saram — Swami Shantananda Puri
  • Sadhanas from Guru Vachaka Kovai — Swami Shantananda Puri
  • The Quantum Leap into The Absolute (Essence of Ashtavakra Gita) — Swami Shantananda Puri
  • Instant Self-Awareness (Talks on Ashtavakra Gita) — Swami Shantananda Puri
  • The Collected Work of Sri Ramana Maharshi — Sri Ramana Maharshi
  • The Paramount Importance of Self-Attention — Sri Sadhu Om
  • Sri Ramanopadesa Noonmalai — Sri Sadhu Om
  • Sri Arunachala Stuti Panchakam — Sri Sadhu Om
  • The Essence of Spiritual Practice (Sadhanai Saram) — Sri Sadhu Om
  • The Path of Sri Ramana (Part 2) — Sri Sadhu Om
  • The Path of Sri Ramana (Part 1) — Sri Sadhu Om
  • I am that — Sri Nisargadatta Maharaj
  • Guru Vachaka Kovai (The Garland of Guru’s Sayings) — Sri Muruganar
  • Mrurganar - Ramana Puranam
  • Happiness and The Art of Being — Michael James
  • The Power of Arunachala — Michael James
  • Guru Vachaka Kovai (sayings of Ramana Maharshi) — David Godman
  • Be As You Are - The Teachings of Sri Ramana Maharshi — David Godman
  • Sadhanas from Devikalottara Jnanachara Vichara Patalah — Devi Shantananda Puri
  • A Sadhu’s Reminiscences of Ramana Maharshi — Sadhu Arunachala (Major A. W. Chadwick)
  • Self-Realisation — B. V. Narasimha Swami
notes: Page has no hero image or subtitle. H1 was 'Ramana Library' rendered as h2. Book list appeared 3x in source (Framer carousel/grid duplication); deduplicated to single list of 41 titles. No inline images.
